ID: US-OLV-013
Title: Render module cards
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-17
Milestone: Hub and module architecture

As a internal operator
I want module cards to clearly show active versus coming-soon areas
So that I know what I can enter and what is still backlog work

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Active modules render as navigable cards.
- [ ] Coming-soon modules render as disabled cards with an explicit badge.

Notes: Implemented in `ModuleCard`; visual and accessibility behavior were not independently verified.
